name: Italian Style Eggplant & Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place the whole eggplant (with skin on) on a rack in the oven.
3. Wrap the bell peppers and celery stalks individually in aluminum foil and place them on the same rack as well.
4. Bake for 30 minutes.
5. Remove the vegetables from the oven and let cool.
6. Bake the eggplant for an additional 15 minutes until it is very tender and has collapsed.
7. When the vegetables are cool enough to handle, peel the eggplant and cut into several pieces. Drain in a colander for about 20 minutes.
8. Squeeze out some of the excess moisture from the eggplant.
9. Chop the bell peppers, removing stems and seeds; leave them in large pieces.
10. Chop the celery into 1/2-inch pieces.
11. Dice the eggplant and combine with the chopped peppers and celery in a large bowl.
12. Heat a few drops of olive oil in a skillet and saute the garlic until golden.
13. Add the sauteed garlic to the bowl.
14. Add the remaining ingredients (olive oil, red wine vinegar, oregano, salt, pepper, and black olives) and mix thoroughly.
15. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 1 hour before serving.
